head: 1096b75
context: Phase 16 (3D Layer) executed inline on main; all GFX-01..04 automated assertions green. Two rounds of maintainer hero-redesign feedback applied. NOT finalized (no 16-03-SUMMARY, phase not marked complete) pending maintainer's nod on the redesigned hive.

completed_tasks.name: Foundation: install pinned 3D stack + public/hero-hive.svg + tests/gfx_spec.py harness
3D layer: dynamic(ssr:false) wrapper + capability-gated canvas + hero.tsx SVG slot + GFX-02/03 assertions
GFX-04 LCP-proxy + no-context-leak; lighthouse install SKIPPED (Playwright proxy is the gate)
UAT round 1: two-panel living-hive lattice + multilayer architecture reframe + Layer 1 expansion + auto-mode origin story
Part C TUI screenshots via charm freeze
completed_tasks.progress: freeze --execute HANGS on Windows (PTY); render harness produced real panel ANSI but PNG step failed; maintainer said skip; harness removed

completed_tasks.name: UAT round 2: single animated honeycomb (dropped 2nd layer+pulses), top-aligned/lifted, SVG fade, left-col alignment fix, copy icons on all command fields, em-dashes stripped, extension-watcher->privileged tier

remaining_tasks.name: Maintainer confirms redesigned hive vertical position ('same row as header') on localhost:3000; dial in lift offset if needed
Write 16-03-SUMMARY.md, mark Phase 16 complete, hand-reconcile STATE.md/ROADMAP.md/REQUIREMENTS.md (GFX-01..04 done), stop dev servers

blockers.description: GSD resolver bug: extractPhaseToken('16-3d-layer') greedily reads the digit-led '3d' token -> returns '16-3d', so phase-plan-index / init.execute-phase / any phase-resolving GSD verb report 'Phase not found' for Phase 16
blockers.workaround: Execute inline + hand-manage STATE.md/ROADMAP.md/REQUIREMENTS.md (project precedent). Do NOT rely on gsd state.* / verify-work tooling resolving this phase. Renaming the dir would diverge the slug + break 35 in-plan path refs.

blockers.description: charmbracelet/freeze --execute hangs on Windows (PTY capture) -> real TUI screenshots blocked
blockers.workaround: TUI screenshots dropped per maintainer. If revisited: render TUI panels as HTML terminal blocks or have maintainer run beekeeper dashboard.

human_actions_pending.action: Review the redesigned hive on http://localhost:3000 and confirm vertical position / look (or request a tweak)
human_actions_pending.context: Maintainer was 'not impressed' twice; the new single animated honeycomb + top-align is the third iteration. Hive lift is a fixed +0.45 nudge so alignment with the headline is approximate.

human_actions_pending.action: Give the go-ahead to finalize Phase 16 (or keep tweaking the hive)
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 16 is NOT marked complete; finalization is gated on the maintainer's nod since the hero was replaced after the original UAT approval.

decisions.decision: 3D = single animated honeycomb (1 center + 6 ring); NO second layer, NO particle pulses
decisions.rationale: Maintainer rejected the dual-layer+pulses design twice as too busy

decisions.decision: Explicit three.js lights instead of drei <Environment preset='city'>
decisions.rationale: Avoids a runtime ~1MB HDRI CDN fetch; self-contained/offline bundle

decisions.decision: GFX-04 gated by Playwright performance LCP proxy; lighthouse skipped
Server SVG (#hero-hive-svg) fades opacity->0 once the real canvas mounts
decisions.rationale: Lifting the hive would otherwise reveal the centered SVG through the transparent canvas (double-image); SVG stays the LCP element

decisions.decision: Editor-extension watcher = Opt-in/privileged tier, not Default

decisions.rationale: Maintainer preference; swept all 13 home components

next_action: Ask the maintainer whether the redesigned hive (localhost:3000) is positioned/looking right. If yes: finalize Phase 16 (write 16-03-SUMMARY.md, mark complete, hand-reconcile STATE/ROADMAP/REQUIREMENTS GFX-01..04, stop dev servers). If no: tweak the lift in web/components/home/hero-canvas.tsx (Hive useFrame: g.position.y base = 0.45) and/or group scale (1.25).
context_notes: Phase 16 executed inline on main (use_worktrees=false; spawned subagents lack node/git/pnpm so they CANNOT build -> DO NOT spawn gsd-executor, run inline). All GFX-01..04 green (pnpm build + web/tests/gfx_spec.py + web/tests/home_spec.py). Working tree clean as of 1096b75 (untracked, all pre-existing: .claude/, AGENTS.md, beekeeper-docs.html, beekeeper-tui-prototype.html, .planning/phases/16-3d-layer/16-PATTERNS.md). Hero is two-panel (copy left / hive right). Key files: web/components/home/{hero,hero-canvas,hero-canvas-wrapper,command-field,install-chip,how-it-works,origin-story}.tsx. Background dev server: pnpm dev on :3000.
